message:
feat(random,conformance,io): add parameter validation to random generators, expand conformance

- fnp-random/lib.rs: convert uniform(), normal(), and exponential() from
  infallible to Result-returning APIs with proper parameter validation
  matching NumPy semantics — reject NaN/infinite bounds, negative scales,
  and reversed ranges; improve binomial() p-range check using contains()
- fnp-conformance/lib.rs: expand differential conformance testing with
  additional test cases and improved oracle comparison logic
- fnp-io/lib.rs: refactor I/O operations for cleaner code structure
- fnp-ndarray/lib.rs: improve ndarray operations
- fnp-ufunc/lib.rs: minor ufunc fix
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
